name: Jax Wood Fired Pizza
tagline: Haleiwa's wood-fired pizza spot with a 4.9 rating — Neapolitan-style pies, craft beer, and a laid-back North Shore vibe.
mustOrder: Margherita — the benchmark for any pizza place
any seasonal special with local toppings
parking: Street parking on Kamehameha Hwy in Haleiwa town
bestTime: Early dinner to snag a table. Popular post-beach spot
talkStory: Jax brings legit wood-fired Neapolitan pizza to the North Shore, and the 4.9 Google rating across 1,000+ reviews says everything. The dough is made fresh daily, the wood-fired oven produces that perfect leopard-spotted char, and they're not afraid to use local ingredients as toppings. It's the kind of casual pizza spot every surf town needs — order at the counter, grab a craft beer, and eat on the patio. A welcome break from plate lunches and shrimp trucks when you've been on the North Shore all day.
